title: Add npm publish workflow with GitHub Actions

title: Add /lilac models slash command with supply-aware model browser
acceptance_criteria: /lilac-models displays formatted table of all Lilac models with pricing, supply, vision, and context | Active model visually highlighted | Discounted pricing matches footer status | TypeScript compiles zero errors | All 12 existing tests pass
agent_context: {"objective":"Add /lilac-models slash command that displays all Lilac models in a formatted supply-aware table using ctx.ui.setWidget()","constraints":{"MUST":["Register command via pi.registerCommand(\"lilac-models\", ...)","Store latest models at module level for command handler access","Display model name, input/output/cache pricing, supply state, discount%, vision support, context window","Update types/omp.d.ts to declare setWidget in UIApi","npx tsc --noEmit exits 0","npm test passes all 12 tests"],"SHOULD":["Support /lilac models (space alias) as alternate invocation","Highlight currently active Lilac model in table","Show table immediately with stale models before live fetch completes"]},"files":{"allowed":["index.ts","types/omp.d.ts","scripts/test-discounts.ts"],"forbidden":[]}}
